tasks.subject: Task 1: Version foreign keys (schema migration)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert Annotation.createdOnVersionId and Review.onVersionId into real relations to DocumentVersion.

**Verify:** pnpm prisma migrate dev --name version_fks; pnpm test:unit; pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Annotation.createdOnVersion FK + index", "Review.onVersion FK + index", "DocumentVersion inverse arrays", "migration applies; tests+build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Re-anchoring (relocate) in anchoring lib
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure relocate(text, quote) → ACTIVE/MOVED/ORPHANED with range.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/anchoring.relocate.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/anchoring.ts", "tests/unit/anchoring.relocate.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/anchoring.relocate.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ACTIVE on shifted exact", "MOVED on light edit", "ORPHANED on removal", "threshold respected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: In-memory document event bus (lib/events.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Process-local pub/sub keyed by document id.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/events.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/events.ts", "tests/unit/events.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/events.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["delivers to same-doc subscribers", "isolates by doc id", "unsubscribe stops delivery"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Versions service (createVersion)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createVersion with optimistic concurrency, re-anchor, approval dismissal, state recompute, publish version.created.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/versions.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/versions.ts", "tests/unit/versions.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/versions.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ConcurrencyError on stale", "no-op on unchanged", "re-anchor classifies+updates", "approvals dismissed+state recomputed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: PATCH version route + publish wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PATCH /api/documents/:id → createVersion; existing services publish events.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit && pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts", "lib/annotations.ts", "lib/reviews.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATCH success/409/400/401", "services publish events", "tests+build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SSE stream route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/documents/:id/stream → SSE from the event bus.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauth", "text/event-stream", "data frames per event", "teardown on cancel"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Markdown editor + save (versioning UI)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CodeMirror edit mode + live preview; Save → PATCH version (409 handled); success refetches.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/DocumentEditor.tsx", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx", "package.json", "pnpm-lock.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["editor+preview toggle", "save PATCHes version", "409 reload message", "success re-renders new version"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Live SSE merge + MOVED/ORPHANED rendering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EventSource subscription merges events; MOVED highlighted distinctly, ORPHANED grouped; shared relocate for positioning.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/highlight.ts", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MOVED distinct, ORPHANED unmarked", "orphaned sidebar section", "live cross-client merge", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: E2E — versioning + live collaboration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Playwright proof: edit→re-anchor (MOVED+ORPHANED), approval reset, live cross-client updates.

**Verify:** pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/versioning.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/versioning.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/versioning.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MOVED after edit", "orphaned after delete", "approval resets to Open", "live cross-client comment"]}
```
